channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Elon Musk Reacts With 'Interesting' as China Backs Startup With $8.4 Billion for Orbital Data Centers
item.description: WASHINGTON — Elon Musk responded with a single word Wednesday to news that China is committing massive financial resources to develop orbital data centers, a move that underscores the intensifying global race to harness space for artificial intelligence infra… [Intel]

item.title: Samsung, SK Hynix and TSMC Battle for AI Chip Supremacy in Asia as 2026 Race Intensifies
